A truthful lint, a Dockerfile health check + layer hygiene, a boot-smoke-tested image, and the new house banner.

## Fixed

- **Truthful ShellCheck lint** — no more `|| true`, and the lint now actually covers the real s6 / session / autostart scripts (which previously matched nothing) and they pass.
- **Apt layer hygiene** — package lists are cleaned within each apt layer, so the image is smaller and the weekly rebuild no longer risks stale-cache build failures.

## Added

- **HEALTHCHECK** — the container now reports health in the Unraid / Docker UI (polls the KasmVNC WebUI; any HTTP status counts as up).
- **READY banner** and a **boot smoke-test gate** in CI — boot the image and require the WebUI to respond before publishing `:latest`. The READY banner no longer prints on a timeout.

## Changed

- New house banner; CA icon on a solid background; the Unraid template now lives in the central templates feed.
